title: Authorize prefix DAO advertisements
description: Bind end-to-end authenticated DAO origins to prefixes they may advertise. Reject unauthorized /0, foreign host routes, and undelegated broad prefixes before any route/replay mutation. Depends on provenance work and prefix semantics.
acceptance_criteria: Root validates authenticated origin and delegated prefix policy before mutation; self /128, delegated prefixes, foreign prefixes, and /0 have literal allow/deny tests across implementations.
close_reason: Prefix DAO auth implemented before any mutation per 44.9.1 semantics; literal /0(reject)/64(delegated ok)/128(self ok)/foreign(reject) tests added; vectors updated; 3 review passes with 0 P0-P2; no dead code
